# SCPreferencesCommitChanges(_:)

**Function**

Commits changes made to the configuration preferences to persistent storage.

## Declaration

```swift
func SCPreferencesCommitChanges(_ prefs: SCPreferences) -> Bool
```

## Parameters

- **prefs**: The preferences session.

## Return Value

`TRUE` if the lock was obtained; `FALSE` if an error occurred.

## Discussion

Implicit calls to the [doc://com.apple.systemconfiguration/documentation/SystemConfiguration/SCPreferencesLock(_:_:)] and [doc://com.apple.systemconfiguration/documentation/SystemConfiguration/SCPreferencesUnlock(_:)] functions are made if exclusive access has not already been established.



## Applying and Committing Changes

- **SCPreferencesApplyChanges(_:)**: Requests that the currently stored configuration preferences be applied to the active configuration.
- **SCPreferencesSynchronize(_:)**: Synchronizes accessed preferences with committed changes.
